display.purpose: Hero infographic title against the gradient. One per screen.

title.purpose: Card titles, strait names, panel headers.

body.purpose: Description copy and prose. Cap line length at 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Axis labels, source lines, meta chrome, small caps.

shadows.name: card-ambient-rest
shadows.purpose: Hub-page InfographicCard at rest. Hub signature.

shadows.name: card-ambient-hover
shadows.purpose: Hub-page InfographicCard on hover, paired with translateY(-2px).

shadows.name: title-drop
shadows.purpose: Display and hub-headline text-shadow over the gradient.

shadows.name: stacked-bar-value
shadows.purpose: White numerals laid over saturated stacked-bar segments. Legibility, not effect.

motion.name: duration-zoom-out
motion.purpose: Strait map zoom-out. Must stay in sync with .map-bg transition.

motion.name: panel-show-delay
motion.purpose: Delay before showing strait detail panels after zoom-in completes.

breakpoints.name: mobile-portrait-cap
breakpoints.purpose: Below this width, infographics flip to flex column or show the rotate overlay.

breakpoints.name: wrapper-cap
breakpoints.purpose: Page-wrapper switches off the viewport-locked max-height.

components.name: Infographic Card (Hub)
components.description: Hub-page card listing a published infographic with title, description, and embed/view CTAs.
components.html:
Renewables on the Rise

Renewables on the Rise

Explore how Indo-Pacific nations are expanding renewable energy infrastructure, with 2024 data on solar, wind, hydropower and more.

View Infographic
components.css: .ds-card-infographic { background: rgba(2, 38, 64, 0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.30); overflow: hidden; transition: border-color 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease, transform 200ms ease; color: #fff; font-family: 'Encode Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; max-width: 400px; } .ds-card-infographic:hover { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.30); box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.40); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-card-thumb { aspect-ratio: 16 / 10; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.05), rgba(255,255,255,0.02)); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-card-thumb-label { font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.20); } .ds-card-body { padding: 1.5rem; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 1.5625rem; font-weight: 600; margin: 0 0 0.5rem 0; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.95); } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.5; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.70); margin: 0 0 1.5rem 0; } .ds-card-actions { display: flex; gap: 0.75rem; flex-wrap: wrap; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Ghost-style button used for embed-copy, view-infographic, and any CTA. The system has no filled primary button.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { font-family: 'Encode Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.20); border-radius: 6px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85); text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms ease, border-color 200ms ease, color 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15); border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.35); color: #fff; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.70); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Embed-Copy Button (Success)
components.description: Secondary button after the embed code copies to clipboard. Two-second confirmation skin.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { font-family: 'Encode Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 0.5rem 1.25rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.20); border-radius: 6px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85); transition: background 200ms ease, border-color 200ms ease, color 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary--success { background: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.20); border-color: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.50); color: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.95); }

components.name: Stacked Bar (Cargo Mix)
components.description: Signature data primitive. Horizontal stacked bar showing container/dry-bulk/tanker share for a strait.
components.html:
48%
32%
20%
Container 48Dry bulk 32Tanker 20
components.css: .ds-stacked-bar { font-family: 'Encode Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; color: #fff; width: 100%; } .ds-stacked-bar__track { display: flex; width: 100%; height: 24px; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-stacked-bar__seg { flex: none; height: 100%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-stacked-bar__seg + .ds-stacked-bar__seg { border-left: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.30); } .ds-seg--container { background: hsl(218, 60%, 58%); } .ds-seg--bulk { background: hsl(34, 60%, 50%); } .ds-seg--tanker { background: hsl(348, 60%, 55%); } .ds-stacked-bar__value { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; text-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.50); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-stacked-bar__legend { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 8px 14px; margin-top: 8px; } .ds-stacked-bar__legend-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; font-size: 11px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.60); } .ds-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 2px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-dot--container { background: hsl(218, 60%, 58%); } .ds-dot--bulk { background: hsl(34, 60%, 50%); } .ds-dot--tanker { background: hsl(348, 60%, 55%); } .ds-stacked-bar__count { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85); font-weight: 500; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

components.name: Strait Circle (Selection Token)
components.description: Signature interactive primitive on the Strait map. Area-scaled disc whose radius encodes tonnage / vessels / value via d3.scaleSqrt. Click expands via FLIP transition into a detail panel.
components.css: .ds-strait-circle { width: 144px; height: 144px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4); cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; transition: transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), background 200ms ease, border-color 200ms ease; } .ds-strait-circle:hover { background: #fff; transform: scale(1.04); border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7); } .ds-strait-circle:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid hsl(218, 60%, 58%); outline-offset: 4px; } .ds-strait-circle__label { font-family: 'Encode Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: #022640; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Page Surface (Atmosphere)
components.description: The page wrapper itself. Vertical gradient + radial blue mix-blend halo + soft top scrim. Atmosphere is part of the page, not an effect.
components.html: Atmosphere is the page
components.css: .ds-surface { position: relative; width: 100%; min-height: 100svh; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #0D0D0D 5%, #022640 105%); overflow: hidden; font-family: 'Encode Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; color: #fff; } .ds-surface__halo { position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; mix-blend-mode: color; z-index: 10; background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 0%, rgba(0, 0, 200, 0.20) 0%, rgba(0, 0, 200, 0) 100%); } .ds-surface__scrim { position: absolute; inset: 0; pointer-events: none; z-index: 0; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.30) 0%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 100%); } .ds-surface__content { position: relative; z-index: 1; padding: 4rem 2rem; } .ds-surface h1 { font-size: clamp(1.866rem, 1.381rem + 3.5vw, 5.052rem); font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.1; text-shadow: 0 5px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25); margin: 0; }

narrative.overview:
A think-tank reading-room rendered as a moonless sea. Surfaces are abyssal navy fading into ink; light arrives through restricted apertures — a single accent blue, a coral alert when something reads as risk, white text held at editorial weight. The mood is satellite-feed-at-2am, not dashboard-at-9am: somebody is paying attention, and the reader is briefly let inside that posture.

Density is restrained on purpose. Each infographic occupies a 16:9 stage and earns one defensible takeaway. Atmosphere — radial blue mix-blend overlays, particle drifts across the Strait map, GSAP-driven intros, FLIP zoom into detail — is structural, not garnish. The system explicitly rejects Tableau corporate slate, generic think-tank PDF flatness, SaaS hero-metric templates, and the host publisher's softer house style. The infographic must feel like a guest essay in a stronger magazine, not a widget in someone else's CMS.
keyCharacteristics: Two-tone vertical gradient (ink → abyss) anchors every embed; never a flat solid.
One accent (Meridian) carries selection, lines, and the container-cargo role; restraint is the rule, not the exception.
Single typeface (Encode Sans) at 400 / 600 only — hierarchy lives in scale and color, not in weight sprawl.
Motion is exponential ease-out, never elastic; respects prefers-reduced-motion.
Landscape canon at 1280×800; portrait gets a respectful rotate overlay rather than a shrunk fallback.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Meridian is the only saturated color permitted as UI chrome. If a second accent enters a screen, justify it as data, not decoration.

rules.name: The Tinted-Black Rule
rules.body: Neither #000 nor #fff ship as raw values. Ink and Bureau both sit on the warm side of pure; the gradient gives away the temperature.

rules.name: The Mix-Blend Halo Rule
rules.body: The radial rgba(0, 0, 200, 0.20) overlay at 50% 0% with mix-blend-mode: color is part of the page surface, not an effect. Do not remove it; do not stack a second blend mode on top of it.

rules.name: The Two-Weight Rule
rules.body: Encode Sans at 400 and 600 only. Italic is permitted for source-attribution copy; bold-italic and 700 are forbidden.

rules.name: The Display Singular Rule
rules.body: One Display element per infographic. If two compete for the role, the second is a Headline.

rules.name: The Atmosphere-Not-Stack Rule
rules.body: Depth comes from the page gradient + mix-blend halo, not from layered shadows on every element. If a new component is asking for a shadow, ask first whether it should sit at z-index 1 with no shadow at all.

rules.name: The Card-Lift Exception
rules.body: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.30) is the hub card's signature. Do not reuse the same value on dialogs, panels, or in-infographic chrome — it is meant to be unique to the hub.

rules.name: The No-Filled-Button Rule
rules.body: No filled primary button exists. CTAs are ghost-style secondaries. If a screen feels like it needs a colored CTA, the screen is wrong, not the system.

rules.name: The Stacked-Bar Is The Chart Rule
rules.body: When a quantitative breakdown across categories is needed, reach for the stacked-bar primitive before reaching for a pie, donut, or grouped bar.

dos: Do anchor every embed in the ink → abyss vertical gradient + radial blue mix-blend halo. The atmosphere is part of the page, not an option.
Do keep Meridian Blue at ≤10% of the surface area on any given infographic.
Do ship every infographic with a footer source link + BFNA logo. The mark stays visible on every host page.
Do use the Utopia clamp ladder (--size-*, --space-*) for all type and spacing. Mixed scales pollute the rhythm.
Do gate every motion (particles, GSAP intros, FLIP transitions, swipe slides) on prefers-reduced-motion: reduce.
Do use font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums on every numeric label that participates in alignment.
donts: Don't make this look like a Tableau dashboard. No dropdown filter as primary UI, no slate-blue corporate skin, no chartjunk legend.
Don't ship a generic think-tank PDF aesthetic — flat icons, pie charts, key-findings bullet callouts.
Don't harmonize with the host publisher's softer house style. Surrendering to it defeats the strategic premise.
Don't use the SaaS hero-metric template (big number / small label / supporting stats / gradient accent).
Don't apply gradient text (background-clip: text over a gradient). Single solid color always.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards, panels, or alerts.
Don't introduce a third font weight; 400 / 600 is the system. No 700, no light, no italic outside source attribution.
Don't propagate the hub-card shadow (0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.30)) to in-infographic chrome — it is the hub's signature only.
Don't add a second saturated accent color to UI chrome. Coral and Amber are data-only roles.
Don't ship a portrait fallback for an infographic. Show the rotate overlay; never let a 16:9 design squash to fit.
Don't stack glassmorphism (additional backdrop-filter: blur layers) on top of the existing card. One blur per surface.
